title: Hey — Chapter 11 is here: Exit Strategy & Legacy
description: Most advisors build a firm to grow — but very few build one that can survive without them.In Chapter 11, I break things down why exit planning isn’t about quitting. It’s about freedom, flexibility, and making sure your business becomes a true asset (not a job y'all can never leave).You’ll learn the different exit options, what makes a firm more valuable, how to prepare for succession starting now, and how to build a legacy that protects your clients, your team, and your family.
author: Dr Jackie Meyer, CPA's Balanced Millionaire: Advisor Edition newsletter

publisher.name: Dr Jackie Meyer, CPA's Balanced Millionaire: Advisor Edition newsletter

title: Hey — Chapter 10 is here: Reclaiming Your Hours
description: Time is the one resource y'all never get back — and most advisors lose it in email, interruptions, and reactive days.In Chapter 10, I break it down to y'all about practical time management strategies that actually work in real life: time-blocking, batching, theme days, timeboxing, and protecting your calendar like it’s a client meeting.This chapter will help y'all stop drowning in busywork, reclaim your focus, and design a schedule that supports both your firm and your life.
author: Dr Jackie Meyer, CPA's Balanced Millionaire: Advisor Edition newsletter

publisher.name: Dr Jackie Meyer, CPA's Balanced Millionaire: Advisor Edition newsletter
